subject: fix(data): use UTC consistently for all aggregation levels
body:
Daily/monthly aggregation used substring(0,10) on timestamps (local
time) while weekly used new Date().getUTC*() (UTC). This caused 62
commits with non-zero timezone offsets to land in different daily/monthly
buckets vs weekly buckets. Fixed by adding getUTCDateKey/getUTCMonthKey
helpers used consistently across all aggregation levels and month file
grouping.

Also fixed 2 commits with impact:"infra" being silently dropped —
added alias mapping infra→infrastructure in calcImpactBreakdown,
accumulateBucket, contributor aggregation, and calcFilterOptions.

All 18 verification checks pass after re-aggregation.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01RbDmv8obRPnToLezqSGmHg
title: use UTC consistently for all aggregation levels
